stemHtml:
Refer to figures.
A turbojet aeroplane is prepared for a 1300 NM flight at FL 350, with a true airspeed of 460 kt and a head wind of 160 kt. The take-off runway limitation is 174 000 kg, the planned departure mass is 160 000 kg.

The departure fuel price is equal to 0.92 times the arrival fuel price (fuel price ratio = 0.92). In order for the airline to optimise its savings, the additional fuel quantity that must be loaded on board is…
